name: SAGA: Synthetic Agentic Graph Architecture for Temporal Benchmark Generation

description: arXiv:2607.17288v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: High quality temporal graph benchmarks with rich semantics and ground-truth anomaly labels are essential for training graph neural networks, yet remain scarce due to privacy constraints and annotation costs. We present SAGA (Synthetic Agentic Graph Architecture), a system for generating large-scale, semantically rich temporal graphs via a four-p...
author: Jiacheng Ding, Xiaofei Zhang
